text: هُ قَالَ وُجِدَ فِي ذُؤَابَةِ سَيْفِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) صَحِيفَةٌ مَكْتُوبٌ فِيهَا لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ وَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ عَلَى مَنْ أَحْدَثَ حَدَثاً أَوْ آوَى مُحْدِثاً وَ مَنِ ادَّعَى إِلَى غَيْرِ أَبِيهِ فَهُوَ كَافِرٌ بِمَا أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ مَنِ ادَّعَى إِلَى غَيْرِ مَوَالِيهِ فَعَلَيْهِ لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Kuleyb Al Asady,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A parchment was found in the handle of a sword of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, in which was written: ‘The Curse of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the Angels is upon the one who initiates an event (killing), or shelters an initiator (of a killing), and the one who claims to other than his (biological) father, so he is a disbeliever with what Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Revealed; and the one who calls (for help) to other than his friends (people of the Religion), so upon him is the Curse of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
